positive: A stylized, intricate geometric pattern featuring whimsical woodland creatures (foxes, hares, owls) interwoven with abstract floral elements and magical runes. The style should be a modern, detailed linocut illustration, highly suitable for screen printing on fabric. Use strong, bold black outlines and a limited, sophisticated color palette of muted forest greens, earthy terracotta, and midnight navy. The composition must be balanced and repeatable, forming a seamless, decorative surface pattern. The design should have a strong central focal point while maintaining an overall sense of organic flow. Clean silhouette, high contrast, sticker art quality, perfect symmetry, vector quality, minimalist depth.
